text:
I can see you've shared a GitHub token, but I need the image file path to proceed. Could you share the image you want to use for the Farcaster Mini App?

Also, I'll need a few more details:
- What's the Vercel deployment URL?
- What's the Farcaster app name/description you want?

Once I have those, I can set up the Farcaster Mini App manifest and push to git.
